name: tls
notes: The runtime currently exposes explicit diagnostics for node:tls but does not implement secure contexts, TLS handshakes, or TLSSocket semantics yet.

apis.name: createServer(...)
apis.notes: Throws a runtime Error noting that TLS servers are not implemented yet.

apis.name: connect(...)
apis.notes: Throws a runtime Error noting that TLS client sockets are not implemented yet.

apis.name: createSecureContext([options])
apis.notes: Throws a runtime Error noting that secure context creation is not implemented yet.
